description: Required artifacts and key schema for every robust-rl-locomotion training run. Validated by tools/validate_results.py.

eval_shifted.jsonl.description: Newline-delimited JSON (JSONL). One entry per evaluated severity. Produced by scripts/eval_shifted_noise.py.
invariants: All lines must share the same eval_seed_list_hash (one seed list per eval_shifted_noise.py run).
If eval_shifted.jsonl episodes == eval_clean.json episodes, their hashes must also match.
shift_type must be 'gaussian' for Phase 5 runs.

type_legend.str: Python str -- must be a non-null string
type_legend.int: Python int -- must be a non-null integer (booleans excluded)
type_legend.number: Python int or float -- must be a non-null numeric value
